evals.prompt: I have a research question about whether a mentoring program raises student retention, a panel dataset, and a survey instrument for engagement. Walk me through the whole thing from design to defensible conclusions.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ssci-orchestrator: opens a Design Passport and sequences the pipeline design-gate -> measurement-gate -> sampling-gate -> the right analysis module -> inference-gate, enforcing gate order and dispatching each stage rather than doing the analysis itself.

assertions.value: Coordinates the staged pipeline and enforces that each gate passes before the next stage runs, dispatching to sibling skills.

evals.prompt: Can you run a full methodology review on my study end to end and tell me at each stage whether I'm cleared to proceed?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ssci-orchestrator: runs the stage-gated pipeline, emitting a PASS / WARN / BLOCK verdict per gate and refusing to advance past a fail-closed BLOCK (design-gate, inference-gate).

assertions.value: Produces a per-gate PASS/WARN/BLOCK verdict and holds the pipeline at a fail-closed gate until it is resolved.

evals.prompt: Help me design this study, figure out how many participants I need, and then make sure the claims I write at the end are defensible.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ssci-orchestrator because the ask spans multiple stages (design + sampling + inference); it coordinates the gates in order via the Design Passport rather than treating it as one isolated step.

assertions.value: Recognizes a multi-stage request and coordinates the relevant gates in sequence instead of answering a single gate.

evals.prompt: How do I fan out subagents and run a judge panel over several draft answers, with adversarial verification?
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger this skill; defers to alterlab-workflow-orchestration. That is general multi-agent execution mechanics, not the social-science methods pipeline.

evals.prompt: I just need to know what research design fits my question — nothing else.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger the orchestrator; defers to alterlab-ssci-design-gate. A single-stage design question needs the gate directly, not pipeline coordination.
